message:
chore: bump version to 0.9.1

Tab switching fixes:
- Fix tab switching hang when switching between tabs multiple times
- Reconnect WebSocket to correct target after tab switch
- Find specific target WebSocket URL when multiple tabs exist
- Add detailed CDP debug logging for tab switch diagnostics

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.0",
+  "version": "0.9.1",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
